message:
fix: resolve screencast streaming and rendering issues

Key fixes:
- Start reader thread BEFORE Page.startScreencast to properly ACK frames
- Add chunked transfer for Kitty graphics (4096 byte limit per chunk)
- Add SHM support with proper base64 encoded name for Kitty protocol
- Fix mouse input handling (motion flag bit 32, coordinate normalization)
- Add socket timeout to prevent hanging on unresponsive CDP endpoints
- Fix string lifetime issues in CDP session discovery (use allocator.dupe)
- Add Ghostty terminal detection to disable SHM (not fully supported)
- Add CDP event debug logging for troubleshooting

Also includes:
- Image decode module (stb_image) for JPEG/PNG to RGBA conversion
- Interactive browser selection at startup via detector.zig
- Improved coordinate mapping for click accuracy

files.patch:
@@ -422,6 +422,14 @@ google-chrome "https://example.com"  # Linux
 Some sites detect headless Chrome. Not much can be done currently.
 Workaround: Use a different site or wait for future anti-detection features.
 
+**Cause 4:** Ghostty does not support Kitty SHM transfers on your build (UI renders but page area is blank)
+
+**Fix:**
+```bash
+TERMWEB_DISABLE_SHM=1 termweb open https://example.com
+# To override auto-disable: TERMWEB_FORCE_SHM=1
+```
+
 ### Forms Not Working
 
 **Error:** Pressing 'f' shows "No elements"
